ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Colby LaVelle, II, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court orders the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
